title: Shaggy Romantic Thai Pepper Sansho in Flambé Ramekin Pad-See-Eew
description: This romantic dish features sansho pepper and flambé technique to create a spicy, aromatic Shaggy-inspired culinary experience.
instructions: Blend tofu and onion into a smooth paste.
Sauté blended mixture, bell pepper, and chili paste in a pan until vegetables are softened.
Add fish sauce and Thai pepper sauce to the mixture. Stir well.
Gradually add water while stirring continuously until the mixture becomes thick.
Stir in Sansho powder until evenly distributed.
Pour mixture into individual ramekins. Place on hot plate and let flambé for 20 seconds or until flames appear.
Serve hot with steamed jasmine rice.

axes.dishForm: Romantic Thai Peppery Sansho in Flambé Ramekin Pad-See-Eew
